frontier: Closed-lane admission control for the GNFS research queue.
action: Ran a frozen-fixture selector regression against the current control-plane logic.
verified: The selector still admits the rotate-away GNFS item both by priority and explicit request; its revision matches the previously verified admission-failure receipt.
result: Confirmed a scheduler/materializer defect, not a GNFS or factorization result. No session or queue artifact was written by the probe.
next_gate: Add a closed-lane eligibility filter before session creation, then pass a frozen-queue regression proving blocked items create neither sessions nor queue-pointer updates.
boundary_held: No production Atlas writes, external submissions, git pushes, or training unless explicitly authorized.
